text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the way home after my day out with
Kawakami Princess, a group of laughing children
run past us.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hey! You ruined my magic circle!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Hmm? Did something happen, Sweep?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
It's the absolute worst! Those are the brats
everyone at the academy has been talking about!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: They completely messed up the magic circle I was drawing! Grrrr! Now I gotta start all over!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Well, don't you worry for a second! I'll go and
teach them a lesson!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Almost before the words finish leaving her mouth,
Kawakami Princess dashes off. I hurry after her in
a panic, only to find...

text_block_list.name: Timid Rascal
text_block_list.text:
Oi, this is bad, Boss! She's followed us all the way
to our base!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Wearing a Cap
text_block_list.text:
Hmph, that's no big deal! What's a stupid-lookin'
Umamusume like her gonna do to us?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Stupid-looking?! For a little kid, you've got a lot
of nerve...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
But you're just the kind of adversary I like! Let me
respond to that fiery spirit of yours with a hearty
dose of princess discipline!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Huh? Why, Trainer?
choice_data_list:
Don't you think there's a more amicable way to
resolve this?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Maybe you have a point—it wouldn't be
very princess-like to go all out against a child!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
My conduct must always befit a princess—in that
it must be beautiful, graceful, and courageous! All
right, I'll do this fair and square!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
You there—you look like the leader of these
rascals! On my honor as a princess, I challenge
you to a duel!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Wearing a Cap
text_block_list.text: Huuuh? A duel?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Yes! Of course, since you're just a little kid, I'll
allow you an advantage!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
But if I win, then you and your group will have to
stop your pranks. So? Do you have the courage
to accept my challenge?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Wearing a Cap
text_block_list.text: Heh! You're on!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Haaah! That makes five victories in a row for me!

text_block_list.name: Lively Rascal
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what do we do, Boss?! She took all your milk
caps!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Wearing a Cap
text_block_list.text:
H-how?! How's she this good when she's only usin'
her pinkie and ring fingers?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Heh... That makes seventeen straight wins in hide-and-seek, tag, and kendama! Not to mention I was at a disadvantage for all of them!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
The results are clear! It's time for you to stop and
reflect on your misdoings—

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Wearing a Cap
text_block_list.text: A-amazin'! You're incredible!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Oh?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Wearing a Cap
text_block_list.text:
Hey, why're you so good at everythin'?! Are you
usin' some kind of trick?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Heh-heh. Well, you see, not too long ago, I was the leader of all the rascals 'round town—

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Ack! A-ahem, I mean... being adaptable is a
natural skill of any princess!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Wearing a Cap
text_block_list.text: COOL! So, um... can I be your apprentice?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
My apprentice? Hehe, I guess that wouldn't be a
problem...
choice_data_list:
You might as well teach her the ropes since
we're here.

Let's ride this momentum and conquer the
whole town!

Let's ride this momentum and conquer the
whole town!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
My apprentice? Hehe, I guess that wouldn't be a
problem...
choice_data_list:
You might as well teach her the ropes since
we're here.

Let's ride this momentum and conquer the
whole town!

Let's ride this momentum and conquer the
whole town!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Well, since my trainer's on board, okay! From this
day forward, you are officially a princess
apprentice!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Wearing a Cap
text_block_list.text:
Yeeeah! Okay, so first, teach me that technique
you used before!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Certainly! Once I'm done with you, your skills will
know no equal!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After this, Kawakami Princess teaches the
children all sorts of things, from her secret
techniques to entirely new games.

text_block_list.name: Perky Rascal
text_block_list.text:
Good call! This princess lady's basically invincible!
With her on our side, we can crush those chumps
over in the next park!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Wearing a Cap
text_block_list.text:
All right, lady! Let's get goin'! C'mon, this way,
this way!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
H-huh? Uh, why am I coming?! P-please wait a
momen—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Overwhelmed by the insistent crowd of chattering
children, Kawakami Princess finds herself dragged
along on a quest for small-scale conquest.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Uwaaaahhh! At this rate, I'm just a rascal leader,
not a princess!
